title: release skopeo 0.1.31
body:
Can we draft a new release of Skopeo? The latest version doesn't compile on i586 which is currently a blocker to get it into openSUSE Tumbleweed. In particular, we need commit 976d57ea45f524f2299cd9fb444ba9912edc07b8 but we're hesitant to have a backport in the package.

@runcom @mtrmac @rhatdan

comments.body:
Sure.

@runcom usually does the releases; is there more to it than the two commits, a tag, and a GitHub release entry? If not, I can do that early next week (feel free to remind me if necessary.)
I believe that is all that is needed.
Thank you all! Skopeo v0.1.31 is on its way into Tumbleweed :)
Kicking off new skopeo builds for F28 and Rawhide is already updated.  Will also create packages for future RHEL releases.
